raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The limited supply of housing in California is causing more families to be displaced or experience financial hardship.",
    "Older adults are the fastest-growing population of unhoused persons in California.",
    "AB 1993 will allow Residential Care Facilities for the Elderly to serve up to eight individuals, unlocking homes for thousands of residents.",
    "AB 2347 requires landlords to file proof of service with the court to prevent default judgments that evict tenants based on improper service.",
    "Sewer service is a violation of tenants' constitutional rights and can lead to extreme consequences such as tenants losing their homes.",
```
